meaning: adj.(古希腊哲学)四大要素(土、水、气、火),自然力的
examples: Social norms are primitive and elemental.
Each elemental unit has a simple layout consisting of a rectangular box and a triangular roof.
Even nitrogen, which is a gas in its elemental state, is normally absorbed from the soil as nitrate ions.
That is our most basic and elemental promise to the people of the world.
Under the guise of current events, Skolimowski artfully conjures an elemental archetype of human life itself.
